description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a rectangular hedge and evenly spaced ornamental trees, creating a private garden enclosure. The building features a compact, rectangular footprint with multiple rooms visible through large windows and glass doors. The main entrance is accessible via a short set of steps leading to a central pathway, flanked by the hedge. The roof is flat, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, giving the structure a modern and clean appearance. The windows are arranged in both single and grouped patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential lot with a focus on privacy and landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a surrounding hedge and trees, set within a private garden enclosure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pathway, and symmetrical hedge with trees lining the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows and the arrangement of rooms, with the hedge and trees visible along the boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional windows and a clear view of the flat roof and garden enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the continuation of the hedge and tree arrangement around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on multiple facades
